title: 目標達成の後に・みんなのちゃんこ鍋☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono hosts the Chanko Tournament to
bond with her fans, and participants come from
all over to show off their own signature chanko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Chanko Tournament ends on a warm note
with Hishi Akebono saying how tasty everyone's
chanko looks despite them all being different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Hishi Akebono posts some words
she lives by on Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her post, she urges everyone to protect and
preserve their own unique flavors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters S. is waiting for us once summer
camp is over. It's time to ramp up training so we
can be at our best for it!
